records.question: I'm looking for customers from Carleefort, USA named Jensen M who use the login name pbecker, have phone number (650)406-8761, and login password 5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4.
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.login_password = '5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4' AND customers.phone_number = '(650)406-8761' AND customers.country = 'USA' AND customers.customer_first_name = 'Jensen' AND customers.customer_middle_initial = 'M' AND customers.town_city = 'Carleefort' AND customers.login_name = 'pbecker'
records.pred_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE town_city = 'Carleefort' AND country = 'USA' AND customer_last_name = 'Jensen' AND customer_middle_initial = 'M' AND login_name = 'pbecker' AND phone_number = '(650)406-8761' AND login_password = '5fe7c12dc3176ddf67c4'

records.question: Which customers have the login name 'feeney.lauriane', are from Arkansas with middle initial 'K', live in New Nikolas, have phone number '(488)524-5345' and email address 'homenick.ambrose@example.net', have placed orders, and have accounts with other account details 'VIP'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.login_name = 'feeney.lauriane' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' AND customers.state_county_province = 'Arkansas' AND customers.customer_middle_initial = 'K' AND customers.town_city = 'New Nikolas' AND customers.phone_number = '(488)524-5345' AND customers.email_address = 'homenick.ambrose@example.net'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Accounts AS T3 ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id WHERE T1.login_name = 'feeney.lauriane' AND T1.state_county_province = 'Arkansas' AND T1.customer_middle_initial = 'K' AND T1.town_city = 'New Nikolas' AND T1.phone_number = '(488)524-5345' AND T1.email_address = 'homenick.ambrose@example.net' AND T3.other_account_details = 'VIP'

records.question: Which customers named Abbey with middle initial B, located in California, with phone number 1-344-593-4896x425 and login password d7629de5171fe29106c8, have a Regular account named 710 that was opened on or before 2009-06-13 11:41:52?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_middle_initial = 'B' AND customers.phone_number = '1-344-593-4896x425' AND accounts.account_name = '710' AND customers.customer_first_name = 'Abbey' AND accounts.date_account_opened <= '2009-06-13 11:41:52' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'Regular' AND customers.state_county_province = 'California' AND customers.login_password = 'd7629de5171fe29106c8'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Accounts AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
WHERE
  T1.customer_first_name = 'Abbey' AND T1.customer_middle_initial = 'B' AND T1.state_county_province = 'California' AND T1.phone_number = '1-344-593-4896x425' AND T1.login_password = 'd7629de5171fe29106c8' AND T2.account_name = '710' AND T2.other_account_details LIKE '%Regular%' AND T2.date_account_opened <= '2009-06-13 11:41:52'

records.question: Which customers have the last name Boyle, login name dthiel, and VIP in their account details?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_last_name = 'Boyle' AND accounts.other_account_details = 'VIP' AND customers.login_name = 'dthiel'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Accounts AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.customer_last_name = 'Boyle' AND T1.login_name = 'dthiel' AND T2.other_account_details LIKE '%VIP%'

records.question: Which female customers have both placed orders and hold accounts, where gender is '0'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
JOIN accounts ON customers.customer_id = accounts.customer_id
WHERE customers.gender = '0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Accounts AS T3 ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id WHERE T1.gender = '0' GROUP BY T1.customer_id
